label: MODELED
doctrine: v11: MODELED orbital ROADMAP. No on-orbit hardware. Every node is modeled:true / reachable:false and every link is modeled:true — there is no code path that fabricates a live/reachable orbital node. The real asset today is the GROUND GPU fabric; this is its forward orbital extension. Λ = Conjecture 1; sovereign=false.
